rows.label: qev086909_MSG0001
rows.name:
The project finally picked up steam
once we had Rock helping us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086909_MSG0002
rows.name:
Then this dang accident had to come along
and ruin it all. Horse nuggets, I say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086909_MSG0003
rows.name:
Anyway, most of the materials are
shot, and we can't get a fix on
any spares to replace them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086909_MSG0004
rows.name:
At this rate, we'll have to put
things on hold indefinitely.
Talk about your rotten luck...[ST:wait ]
